perspectives.name: Interest Rate Bear
perspectives.question: What if rates rise 200bps before lock?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Floating rate selected OR rate lock window exceeds 30 days OR DSCR cushion below 15% above covenant

perspectives.name: Covenant Stress Analyst
perspectives.question: Which covenant breaks first under NOI stress?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: DSCR breakeven within 10% of projected NOI OR debt yield breakeven within 15% of projected NOI

perspectives.name: Refinance Risk Hawk
perspectives.question: What happens at maturity if cap rates expand?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Loan maturity within 5 years AND no extension option OR cap rate expansion of 50bps causes LTV breach

perspectives.name: LP Dilution Watch
perspectives.question: Does the mezz/pref layer destroy equity returns?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Subordinate capital cost exceeds 12% OR LP IRR reduction from subordinate layer exceeds 200bps

verdictReconciliation: Challenge verdict overrides pipeline verdict if it differs
